description_zh: 你是 Teamo-Lite，一個用於任務規劃和線上資訊收集的高速人工智慧。
original_description: You are Teamo-Lite, a high-speed AI for task planning and online information gathering.

title: telegram-todolist
description: Telegram bot Todo List manager.
description_zh: Telegram 機器人待辦事項清單管理器。
original_description: Telegram bot Todo List manager.

title: telnyx-bot-signup
description: Automated Telnyx bot account signup via Proof of Work challenge.
description_zh: 透過工作證明挑戰自動註冊 Telnyx 機器人帳戶。
original_description: Automated Telnyx bot account signup via Proof of Work challenge.

title: tg-groupchat-setup
description: Configure a MoltBot agent to participate in a Telegram group chat.
description_zh: 配置 MoltBot 代理以參與 Telegram 群聊。
original_description: Configure a MoltBot agent to participate in a Telegram group chat.

title: timecamp
description: Use when the user asks about time tracking, time entries, tasks, timers, or anything related to TimeCamp.
description_zh: 當使用者詢問時間追蹤、時間條目、任務、計時器或與 TimeCamp 相關的任何內容時使用。
original_description: Use when the user asks about time tracking, time entries, tasks, timers, or anything related to TimeCamp.

title: to-do
description: Give your AI the power to act in the future.
description_zh: 賦予您的人工智慧未來行動的能力。
original_description: Give your AI the power to act in the future.

title: todo-boss
description: Task capture + delegation tracking + daily remaining-work report for Telegram.
description_zh: Telegram 的任務捕獲+委託追蹤+每日剩餘工作報告。
original_description: Task capture + delegation tracking + daily remaining-work report for Telegram.

title: todokan
description: Manage tasks, boards, thoughts, and reviews in Todokan via MCP.
description_zh: 透過 MCP 在 Todokan 中管理任務、看板、想法和評論。
original_description: Manage tasks, boards, thoughts, and reviews in Todokan via MCP.

title: todokan-review-loop
description: Process Todokan task and thought boards with a review-loop workflow.
description_zh: 使用審閱循環工作流程處理 Todokan 任務和思想板。
original_description: Process Todokan task and thought boards with a review-loop workflow.

title: token-management
description: Centralized API token management workflow.
description_zh: 集中式 API 令牌管理工作流程。
original_description: Centralized API token management workflow.

title: token-vesting
description: Create and manage token vesting streams using the Sablier Lockup protocol (linear, dynamic, tranched).
description_zh: 使用 Sablier Lockup 協定（線性、動態、分段）建立和管理代幣歸屬流。
original_description: Create and manage token vesting streams using the Sablier Lockup protocol (linear, dynamic, tranched).

title: ttt
description: Manage TinyTalkingTodos lists and items via the ttt CLI.
description_zh: 透過 ttt CLI 管理 TinyTalkingTodos 清單和項目。
original_description: Manage TinyTalkingTodos lists and items via the ttt CLI.

title: tududi
description: Manage tasks, projects, and notes in tududi (self-hosted task manager)
description_zh: 在tududi（自架任務管理器）中管理任務、專案和筆記
original_description: Manage tasks, projects, and notes in tududi (self-hosted task manager)

title: unitask-task-agent
description: Manage tasks + time blocks in Unitask (unitask.app) via scoped API token (CLI or MCP).
description_zh: 透過作用域 API 令牌（CLI 或 MCP）管理 Unitask (unitask.app) 中的任務和時間區塊。
original_description: Manage tasks + time blocks in Unitask (unitask.app) via scoped API token (CLI or MCP).

title: upwork-hunting
description: Systematically find and win Upwork jobs using our n8n workflow library (2,061 templates) as a speed advantage.
description_zh: 使用我們的 n8n 工作流程庫（2,061 個範本）作為速度優勢，系統地尋找並贏得 Upwork 工作。
original_description: Systematically find and win Upwork jobs using our n8n workflow library (2,061 templates) as a speed advantage.

title: verk
description: Manage tasks, projects, and workflows in Verk — AI-powered task management.
description_zh: 在 Verk（人工智慧驅動的任務管理）中管理任務、專案和工作流程。
original_description: Manage tasks, projects, and workflows in Verk — AI-powered task management.

title: vikunja-kanban
description: Manage a Vikunja kanban board via API.
description_zh: 透過 API 管理 Vikunja 看板。
original_description: Manage a Vikunja kanban board via API.

title: vikunja-tasks
description: Manage tasks and projects on a self-hosted Vikunja instance.
description_zh: 在自架 Vikunja 執行個體上管理任務和專案。
original_description: Manage tasks and projects on a self-hosted Vikunja instance.

title: waste-reminder
description: A flexible, token-efficient skill for automated waste container collection reminders.
description_zh: 一種靈活、高效的技能，用於自動廢物容器收集提醒。
original_description: A flexible, token-efficient skill for automated waste container collection reminders.

title: workflow-engine
description: Structural parity skeleton for queue-driven orchestration in a workflow context.
description_zh: 工作流程上下文中佇列驅動編排的結構奇偶校驗框架。
original_description: Structural parity skeleton for queue-driven orchestration in a workflow context.

title: workflow-tools
description: Work smarter with loop detection, parallel decisions, and file size analysis.
description_zh: 透過循環檢測、並行決策和文件大小分析更聰明地工作。
original_description: Work smarter with loop detection, parallel decisions, and file size analysis.

title: wrike
description: Manage Wrike tasks, projects, folders, and comments via the Wrike REST API.
description_zh: 透過 Wrike REST API 管理 Wrike 任務、專案、資料夾和評論。
original_description: Manage Wrike tasks, projects, folders, and comments via the Wrike REST API.

title: writing-plans
description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code.
description_zh: 當您在接觸程式碼之前對多步驟任務有規範或要求時使用。
original_description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code.

title: writing-plans-2
description: Break design into 2-5 minute tasks with verification steps.
description_zh: 將設計分解為 2-5 分鐘的任務並進行驗證步驟。
original_description: Break design into 2-5 minute tasks with verification steps.

title: x-agent
description: Plan and run X (Twitter) operations in three modes: (1) monitor-only intelligence, (2) draft-and-approve posting.
description_zh: 以三種模式規劃和運行 X (Twitter) 操作：(1) 僅監控情報，(2) 起草並批准發布。
original_description: Plan and run X (Twitter) operations in three modes: (1) monitor-only intelligence, (2) draft-and-approve posting.

title: yield-farming-agent
description: Autonomous yield farming agent for BNB Chain with deterministic execution, smart contract integration.
description_zh: BNB 鏈的自主流動性挖礦代理，具有確定性執行、智慧合約整合。
original_description: Autonomous yield farming agent for BNB Chain with deterministic execution, smart contract integration.

title: zero-rules
description: Intercept deterministic tasks (math, time, currency, files, scheduling) BEFORE they hit the LLM.
description_zh: 在進入法學碩士之前攔截確定性任務（數學、時間、貨幣、文件、日程安排）。
original_description: Intercept deterministic tasks (math, time, currency, files, scheduling) BEFORE they hit the LLM.

title: zonein
description: Track and analyze top traders with >75% win-rate on Hyperliquid and Polymarket via Zonein API.
description_zh: 透過 Zonein API 追蹤和分析 Hyperliquid 和 Polymarket 勝率 >75% 的頂級交易者。
original_description: Track and analyze top traders with >75% win-rate on Hyperliquid and Polymarket via Zonein API.

title: zulip
description: Interact with Zulip chat platform via REST API and Python client.
description_zh: 透過 REST API 和 Python 用戶端與 Zulip 聊天平台互動。
original_description: Interact with Zulip chat platform via REST API and Python client.
